archiveConfirm: Archiving moves this course to "Archived". You can restore it later; editing and learning remain available while archived.
askPreviewQuestionPlaceholder: Enter a question to test follow-up settings
askPreviewUsedFallback: Provider {provider} failed, switched to LLM fallback

askProviderDescriptions.coze: Use the Coze bot chat API for follow-up.
askProviderDescriptions.coze_workflow: Use the Coze workflow run API for follow-up.
askProviderDescriptions.dify: Use the Dify chat app for follow-up.
askProviderDescriptions.llm: Use the built-in follow-up LLM only.
askProviderDescriptions.volc_knowledge: Use the Volcengine knowledge base search API for follow-up.

account_id.hint: Volcengine account ID for the V-Account-Id header.
account_id.label: Account ID

debugDisabledBySoftLimit: Credit balance is below the reminder threshold. Debug preview is disabled.
draftConflictDescription: This course was updated by {phone}. Load the latest content to continue editing safely.
draftConflictSynced: This lesson was updated by {phone}. Synced the latest content.
draftSelfUpdateDescription: This lesson was updated in another page or tool. Load the latest content to keep editing safely.
draftSelfUpdateSynced: This lesson was updated in another page or tool. Synced the latest content.
imageFormatHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG. Max size 2MB, recommended aspect ratio 1:1
minimaxCloneDisplayNameHint: Optional. If left blank, a name is generated so you can identify the voice after cloning.
minimaxClonePreviewUnavailable: Preview is available after the voice is ready
minimaxCloneRecordingUnsupported: Recording is not available in this browser
minimaxCloneSourceAudioDescription: Source audio is the main voice sample to clone. You must record the same person speaking clearly for at least {minSeconds}s and up to {maxMinutes} minutes. Use a quiet room and avoid background music.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonCloneInProgress: Voice cloning has been submitted and is waiting for processing.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonInsufficientCred: Insufficient credits to submit voice cloning.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonMissingSource: Record at least {seconds}s of source audio.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonRecording: Recording is in progress. Stop recording before submitting.
minimaxCloneSubmitReasonSourceTooShort: Source audio must be at least {minSeconds}s. Current length is {currentSeconds}s. Continue recording past 10s before stopping.
minimaxManualVoiceInvalid: Enter a valid MiniMax custom voice ID
permissionContactRequired: Please enter at least one contact
permissionEmailPlaceholder: Enter email addresses, separated by comma or newline
permissionLimit: Up to {count} shared users are allowed
permissionOwnerNotAllowed: You can't grant permissions to the course creator
permissionPhonePlaceholder: Enter phone numbers to grant shared access in bulk
permissionSectionDesc: Grant access to this course for other users
selectModelHint: Recommended to use the default model
shifuPriceFormat: Price must be a valid number
shifuPromptHint: Define the course's audience, tone, and guardrails
shifuTemperatureFormat: Temperature must be a valid number
supportedFormats: Only JPG and PNG formats are supported
temperatureHint: Set the creativity of the AI output (0-2)
temperatureHint2: The lower the temperature, the more stable the output, but the lower the creativity; the higher the temperature, the more unstable the output, but the higher the creativity
title: Course Settings
ttsDescription: When enabled, lessons are taught with PPT and voice playback
ttsProviderRequiredDesc: Please choose a voice provider before enabling listen mode.
unarchiveConfirm: Unarchiving moves the course back to "All". Editing and learning remain available.
uploadFailed: Upload failed, please try again later
useLearnerLanguageDescription: When enabled, AI will teach in the language selected by learner
